title: Fermented Juicy Turkish Quinoa Stir-fry
description: A diabetic-friendly one-pot dish featuring quinoa, vegetables, and a fermented dressing for added flavor and moisture.

ingredients.name: Fermented dressing (like fermented lemon juice or vinegar-based), for drizzling
ingredients.notes: Use a safe temperature for fermentation and ensure it is properly diluted with water to avoid any issues with spores.

instructions: Rinse the quinoa in cold water. Cook according to package instructions until tender but still a little firm.
Sauté mixed vegetables, minced garlic, and tomato paste in olive oil over medium heat until softened.
Stir in cooked quinoa and season with salt and pepper. Mix well.
Drizzle the fermented dressing over the mixture while stirring gently to coat evenly.
Cook for another 5-10 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender and everything is heated through.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish.
